variants.note: BLOCKED: Awaiting supplier confirmation on exact battery spec. Variants use '30-Day' from current product data. Do NOT publish until spec is confirmed.

variant_a.copy: PAW PURE Wireless Cat Water Fountain Stainless Steel — 30-Day Battery, Cordless Pet Fountain for Cats & Small Dogs, Ultra-Quiet 20dB, Premium Design, 3L/108oz

variant_b.copy: PAW PURE Wireless Cat Water Fountain — 30-Day Battery Life, Stainless Steel Tray, 20dB Ultra-Quiet Cordless Pet Fountain for Cats & Small Dogs, 3L/108oz

variants.recommendation_rationale: Variant B leads with '30-Day Battery Life' immediately after the primary keyword, improving mobile visibility of the battery claim. 'Stainless Steel Tray' is more specific than competitors who say 'Stainless Steel' (differentiates the tray design). Score gap of 3 points favors B.

variants.note: DEPRIORITIZED during profitability crisis. Ready to deploy when PPC restructure stabilizes.

variant_a.copy:
Why Pet Parents Rate PAW PURE 4.5 Stars: The Wireless Fountain That Blends Into Your Home

Paw Pure was designed for pet owners who refuse to compromise between their pet's health and their home's aesthetics. Our stainless steel tray eliminates plastic taste while the cordless, ultra-quiet 20dB motor runs for up to 30 days on a single charge — so your cat drinks more, and you hear less.

Every detail is intentional: a premium silhouette that sits beautifully on any countertop, three smart flow modes that encourage hydration, and a design that takes seconds to clean. It's the fountain 4.5-star reviewers call 'worth every penny.'

variant_b.copy:
4.5 Stars and Counting: The Quietest Wireless Pet Fountain for Cats Who Deserve Better

Your cat won't drink stale water from a plastic bowl — and you shouldn't have to look at an ugly fountain to fix that. Paw Pure's stainless steel tray keeps water fresh and chemical-free, while the 20dB whisper-quiet motor makes other fountains sound like appliances.

No cords to hide. No refills for 30 days. No noise at 3 AM. Just clean water in a premium fountain that belongs in your home — not hidden behind the couch. There's a reason pet parents are switching, and it starts with the first sip your cat takes.

variants.recommendation_rationale: Variant B uses emotionally charged, conversational language ('ugly fountain', 'hidden behind the couch', 'no noise at 3 AM') that mirrors how real pet owners think and talk. The 5-point score gap is significant. A is polished but safe — B creates an emotional connection that drives scroll-to-cart.

variant_a.copy: {"bullet_1":"WIRELESS & CORDLESS DESIGN — No cords, no outlet needed. PAW PURE runs up to 30 days on a single charge, so you can place it anywhere your cat prefers to drink. Battery operated cat fountain freedom means cleaner countertops and happier pets.","bullet_2_EXPERIMENTAL":"3 SMART FLOW MODES — Choose Gentle Stream for shy drinkers, Bubble Flow for playful cats, or Continuous Flow for multi-pet homes. Each mode is calibrated to encourage natural hydration habits while keeping the 20dB ultra-quiet operation your household demands.","bullet_3":"STAINLESS STEEL TRAY + PREMIUM BUILD — The entire water-contact surface is food-grade stainless steel — no plastic taste, no BPA concerns. Unlike competitors using plastic reservoirs with steel accents, PAW PURE puts stainless where it matters: where your cat drinks.","bullet_4":"ULTRA-QUIET 20dB OPERATION — At just 20dB, PAW PURE is quieter than a whisper. Perfect for noise-sensitive cats, light sleepers, and open-plan homes. This quiet cat water fountain won't wake you, startle your pet, or clash with your peaceful living space.","bullet_5":"DESIGNED FOR CATS & SMALL DOGS — The 3L/108oz capacity serves multi-pet households for days. Ergonomic drinking height suits cats and small dogs comfortably, with a wide tray that minimizes splash. Easy to disassemble, rinse, and reassemble in under 60 seconds."}

variant_b.copy: {"bullet_1":"CORDLESS PET FOUNTAIN — PLACE IT ANYWHERE — No outlets, no tangled cords. PAW PURE's rechargeable battery lasts up to 30 days, giving you total freedom to put fresh water where your cat actually wants it. A truly wireless stainless steel pet water fountain.","bullet_2_EXPERIMENTAL":"3 FLOW MODES YOUR CAT WILL LOVE — Gentle Stream entices hesitant drinkers. Bubble Flow triggers your cat's natural curiosity. Continuous Flow keeps water moving for multi-pet households. You pick the mode; the 20dB motor stays whisper-quiet in all three.","bullet_3":"STAINLESS STEEL WHERE IT COUNTS — Other fountains hide plastic behind steel trim. PAW PURE's entire drinking tray is food-grade stainless steel — the surface your cat's tongue actually touches. Zero plastic taste, zero BPA, zero compromise.","bullet_4":"20dB: QUIETER THAN A WHISPER — Most fountains hum. PAW PURE barely breathes. At 20dB, it's the quiet cat water fountain that won't wake light sleepers, startle skittish cats, or add background noise to your home. Silence is a feature, not an afterthought.","bullet_5":"BUILT FOR CATS & SMALL DOGS — 3L/108oz capacity means fewer refills for multi-pet homes. The wide, ergonomic tray fits cats and small dogs comfortably with minimal splash. Disassemble, rinse, and reassemble in under 60 seconds — because cleaning shouldn't be a chore."}

keywords_used.keyword: wireless stainless steel pet water fountain

variants.recommendation_rationale: Variant B's Bullet 2 uses pet-behavior language ('entices hesitant drinkers', 'triggers natural curiosity') that speaks to real cat owner concerns. Bullet 3 directly attacks competitors ('Other fountains hide plastic behind steel trim'). 6-point score gap is decisive. B is more memorable and conversion-oriented across all 5 bullets.

variant_a.copy: PAW PURE Wireless Cat Water Fountain Stainless Steel — Cordless Pet Fountain for Cats & Small Dogs, Ultra-Quiet 20dB, Premium Design, 3L/108oz Capacity

variant_b.copy: PAW PURE Wireless Cat Water Fountain for Cats & Small Dogs — Stainless Steel Tray, Cordless, 20dB Ultra-Quiet, 3 Flow Modes, 3L/108oz Pet Water Fountain

variants.recommendation_rationale: Variant B places 'for Cats & Small Dogs' within the first 80 characters (mobile cutoff), ensuring dog-keyword indexing is visible on mobile search results. It also includes '3 Flow Modes' and 'Pet Water Fountain' as a tail anchor for additional indexing. 5-point gap favors B.

variants.note: Zero-risk experiment. Backend changes are invisible to shoppers. Can run alongside PPC experiments.

variant_a.copy: battery operated quiet cordless rechargeable cat drinking dispenser portable pet bowl automatic pump BPA free easy clean silent whisper

variant_b.copy: battery operated quiet cordless rechargeable cat dog drinking dispenser portable automatic pump BPA free silent whisper no noise fountain bowl kitty puppy

variants.recommendation_rationale: Variant B adds 'dog', 'kitty', and 'puppy' — colloquial terms shoppers actually type. These extend indexing to dog-adjacent and casual-pet-owner searches without repeating any title/bullet words. 3-point gap; both are functional but B captures more long-tail.
